caption:
Hey bestie! ✨ Want that custom, quiet luxury look without the designer price tag?
It's all about the perfect fit. A simple alteration can make any piece look expensive on *you*.
What's your favorite piece you've had tailored?

Petite queens, a great fit is key to quiet luxury! 🤍
This structured knit (a high street find!) instantly elevates any simple bottom.
What's your top tip for looking polished on a budget?

Hey lovely! Building a luxurious capsule doesn't need to break the bank. My top tip? Focus on amazing textures.
Think a soft cashmere blend or a structured linen blazer – it instantly elevates your whole look.
What's one texture that makes you feel instantly chic? 🤍
